creator: lioux@FreeBSD.org
text:
My mistake, I've added a cyclic dependency here. :(
devel/directfb currently depends on devel/sdl12. Therefore, devel/sdl12
cannot depend on devel/directfb.

	Any way around this?

-- 
Mario S F Ferreira - DF - Brazil - "I guess this is a signature."
feature, n: a documented bug | bug, n: an undocumented feature
